name: Severability
text: If any provision of this Agreement is held to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.

legal_basis.note: Void agreements — severability of valid parts
Saving clause in statutes — by analogy

invalid_if: Entire contract becomes void if a single clause fails
title: Severability
dispute_hotspots: Non-compete struck down — severability prevents entire agreement from failing
ICA S.24: if main consideration is illegal, severability cannot save the agreement
